message:
Generalize hot-profile to support arbitrary benchmark presets via --workload flag

- Replace hardcoded mixed_read_write assumption in hot-profile with a configurable
  --workload/--preset flag (defaulting to mixed_read_write for backward compat)
- Rename profile_fsqlite_mixed_read_write_hot_path -> profile_fsqlite_hot_path and
  derive scenario_id dynamically from the workload name
- Add canonical Beads benchmark campaign integration to cmd_bench: golden_dir,
  fixture_ids, presets, and concurrency levels auto-populate from the campaign
  manifest when CLI flags are not explicitly overridden
- Introduce BenchCampaignDefaults struct and find_bench_workspace_root to walk
  ancestors looking for the campaign manifest file
- Label fsqlite non-MVCC engine as fsqlite_single_writer instead of plain fsqlite
- Nest hot-profile artifact output under workload subdirectory
- Update help text, replay command formatting, and all affected tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
